overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's commercial district. The player navigates orange-tiled sidewalks past neon storefronts, crosses a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles, and approaches a colorful pedestrian bridge under bright afternoon sun.

large concrete overpass with orange support beams spanning the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk with distinctive orange tactile paving, passing outdoor seating and neon-lit storefronts. The elevated highway structure looms in the distance while pedestrians walk in opposing directions.

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk next to a plain concrete building wall, approaching an intersection. The colorful pedestrian bridge becomes visible in the distance while the camera follows a woman in white toward the traffic lights.

crossing the street with a group of pedestrians as the traffic signal changes

segments.scene_description: At the wide intersection, the camera waits at the yellow-striped crosswalk as a blue futuristic car and other vehicles pass. The traffic light changes and the camera crosses with a crowd of pedestrians, moving toward the white concrete wall on the opposite side while the colorful pedestrian bridge draws closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk alongside high building wall approaching pedestrian overpass

events.description: approaching the colorful pedestrian bridge as it becomes the dominant feature ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the long sidewalk next to the white wall, approaching the vibrant pedestrian bridge

notable_agents.action: man wearing a wide-brimmed hat and boots walking toward the camera

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian bridge with green and yellow striped glass panels crossing over the road

segments.scene_description: Walking along a long stretch of sidewalk bordered by a tall white concrete wall on the right and a busy multi-lane road on the left. The colorful pedestrian bridge with its vibrant rainbow glass panels grows larger ahead, while various pedestrians pass by and futuristic vehicles drive along the adjacent street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a bustling commercial district that transitions from a neon-lit sidewalk to the approach of a vibrant pedestrian bridge. It begins by moving along orange tactile paving past outdoor seating and storefronts, with an elevated highway looming in the distance. As the camera follows a woman in white along a plain concrete wall, the scene opens up toward a wide intersection where the camera pauses at a yellow-striped crosswalk while futuristic blue cars stream past. Once the light changes, the camera crosses with a crowd of pedestrians and shifts toward a long stretch of sidewalk bordered by a tall white concrete wall. The movement finally culminates as the colorful pedestrian bridge with its rainbow glass panels grows larger and more dominant in the frame against the backdrop of the busy multi-lane road.
